code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut product = 1
  mut i = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut val = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if in_num
        product = product * sign * val
        in_num = false
        sign = 1
        val = 0
      end
    else
      if not in_num and b == 45
        sign = -1
        in_num = true
      else if not in_num and b == 43
        sign = 1
        in_num = true
      else
        val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
        in_num = true
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    product = product * sign * val
  end
  println("product=#{product}")
end
